features.name: Project purpose locked
features.description: Cross-provider LLM-spend aggregator. CLI-first phase 1. Multi-surface phase 2+. Public from day 1.

features.name: Phase 1 spec
features.description: Detailed spec for the Anthropic-only CLI MVP at docs/SPEC-PHASE-1.md.

features.name: README candidate
features.description: Santifer-grade README at README.md. Awaiting hero image to fill the placeholder.

features.name: Hero image generated and placed
features.description: User runs the prompt at docs/HERO-IMAGE-PROMPT.md through ChatGPT image gen, places result at assets/hero.png.

scenarios.when: user runs it through ChatGPT image gen
scenarios.then: assets/hero.png exists and renders cleanly in the README at GitHub width (~1200px)

features.name: Public GitHub repo
features.description: Create github.com/shawnpetros/lithium, push initial commit (scaffold + README + hero image + spec).

scenarios.when: the repo is created public on GitHub and pushed
scenarios.then: github.com/shawnpetros/lithium loads with the README rendering correctly and the hero image displaying

features.name: Cargo workspace scaffolded
features.description: cargo new --bin lithium-cli, plus crates/lithium-core (storage + types) and crates/lithium-anthropic (adapter). Workspace Cargo.toml at repo root.

scenarios.given: the workspace layout in the spec
scenarios.then: all three crates compile clean with no warnings

features.name: SQLite schema + migrations
features.description: Schema per spec section 'Data model'. Migrations at crates/lithium-core/migrations/.

scenarios.then: ~/.local/share/lithium/usage.db is created with the schema applied and lithium today returns an empty result without error

features.name: Anthropic admin API adapter
features.description: Polls /v1/organizations/usage_report/messages (or current Anthropic usage endpoint, verify at build), normalizes into the usage table.

scenarios.given: a valid admin key in config
scenarios.then: rows are inserted for the current day's usage with model, token counts, cost in USD, and source=admin_api
exits 1 with a clear error pointing to the config path and instructions to add the key

features.name: Claude Code session-limit reader
features.description: Reads local Claude Code state files (NoobyGains/claude-pulse pattern). Records session+weekly limit usage as percentages with reset timestamps. Source=claude_code_local.

scenarios.given: Claude Code is installed and has been used today
scenarios.then: rows are inserted with session_pct, weekly_pct, session_resets_at, weekly_resets_at

features.name: lithium today
features.description: Subcommand: prints today's spend by source (Admin API direct + Claude Code session/weekly limits) with totals.

scenarios.then: stdout matches the layout in spec section 'CLI surfaces' for the today subcommand

features.name: lithium month
features.description: Subcommand: prints month-to-date totals + projected end-of-month based on average daily spend.

scenarios.given: at least 7 days of usage data
scenarios.then: stdout matches the layout in spec section 'CLI surfaces' for the month subcommand and projection is reasonable

features.name: lithium config
features.description: Subcommand: opens ~/.config/lithium/config.toml in $EDITOR; if missing, writes a template with placeholders.

features.name: lithium adapters
features.description: Subcommand: lists configured adapters and last-poll status.

features.name: Tests + clippy clean
features.description: Unit tests for the cost-calculation, usage-aggregation, and projection logic. clippy --all-targets passes with zero warnings.

features.name: Install instructions verified
features.description: README quick-start runs cleanly on a fresh Mac. cargo install --path crates/lithium-cli works. Doctor command (lithium doctor) verifies setup.

features.name: v0.1.0 cut and tagged
features.description: Tag v0.1.0, GitHub release with notes. Demo gif recorded with vhs (or asciinema) and embedded in README.

features.name: OpenAI adapter (admin key)
features.description: /v1/organizations/usage with admin key.

features.name: OpenRouter adapter
features.description: /api/v1/key for credit balance + recent usage.

features.name: Provider unification in CLI output
features.description: lithium today and lithium month show all configured providers side by side.

features.name: Split into daemon + CLI client
features.description: lithiumd polls on schedule; lithium CLI reads via Unix socket / localhost HTTP.

features.name: launchd plist
features.description: Persistent service via ~/Library/LaunchAgents/io.petros.lithiumd.plist.

features.name: cship segment
features.description: Custom cship segment fed by lithium read endpoint. Shows daily spend + delta in the Claude Code status line.

features.name: SwiftBar plugin
features.description: Menubar surface with breakdown by provider + 'approaching cap' alerts.

features.name: OpenClaw MCP tool
features.description: cost_status_today, cost_status_month, should_defer_dispatch.

features.name: Cost gates
features.description: Heartbeat-callable hook that defers fire-and-forget dispatch when over cap.

features.name: Web dashboard
features.description: Static export of the SQLite -> dashboard. Optional, only if the CLI surface stops being enough.
